title: milion #3400
definition:
1) a mile, among the Romans the distance of a thousand paces or
    eight stadia, about 1.5 km [somewhat less than our mile]
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a mile, among the Romans the distance of a thousand paces or
    eight stadia, about 1.5 km [somewhat less than our mile]

    NASB:  a Roman mile (about 1618 yards):
